ground_truth.title: Industry News
ground_truth.main_content: Industry News feed featuring aggregated news articles from the electrical industry. Recent news items include: Altadena's recovery efforts a year after the Eaton fire from WSIU; Norman Fields Gottscho Capital Management LLC acquires 7,303 shares of WESCO International; David Lee LeGrand obituary; Habitat dedicates 43rd build with Southwire; StretchSense raises $2.3M for XR training gloves from Siemens; Siemens MT0100A Control Transformer product listing; Brooks and Capehart on Trump's approval ratings and mental acuity; Siemens offers free Solid Edge Community Edition for makers; ABB acquires IPEC to enhance electrical monitoring; Shifting segment margins reshaping Siemens valuation; Smart Grid Analytics market report by Schneider Electric; Acuity AYI valuation check as CEO Neil Ashe earns EdisonReport 2025 Person of the Year; Weigh in Motion System market featuring Kistler and Siemens; AWS plans new data center in Georgia with Schneider Electric; Sonepar names new East, West Regional Presidents; Edison neglected maintenance before Eaton Fire; Distressed Debt Legal Insights - District Court reverses Wesco ruling; Factors affecting distance-corrected near visual acuity in intraocular lenses; Siemens Energy AG earnings call transcripts; Siemens 3RV1921-1M AUXILIARY product; Slovenia orders passenger fleet from Siemens and Magyar Vagon; Chip Industry Week in Review; Siemens A6X30149670 asynchronous motor; Eaton fire survivors and SCE compensation program; Siemens Uroskop Luminos Agile Max Table I/O board; HVDC Converter Station market report; Medium Power EV Busbars market analysis; MCU ecosystems and chiplets insights; Why liquid cooling is non-negotiable in AI; Legrand shares gap down; Xsens and Siemens Process Simulate ergonomics; Siemens and AWS CES 2026 coverage; Nearly a year after Eaton Fire, Altadena's Christmas Tree Lane; AdventHealth invests in next-generation MRI technology with Siemens; Insurtech Lumera buys Acuity; Edison makes first payment in Eaton Fire compensation program; Siemens launches PAVE360 automotive; Commonwealth Fusion Systems at CES 2025; Will Eaton stock rebound; Commercial Energy as a Service market; Atkore seeing interest from PE firms; Orbis electric car cooling tech for data centers; ABB advances electrification at Boliden's Aitik facility; E&R Industrial names new CEO; CISA flags ICS vulnerabilities in Rockwell products; Eaton expands Henrico County Virginia manufacturing; ABB powers Spain plant with EV charging; Schneider Electric inks Rs 718 crore deal for Tamil Nadu expansion; Product Pick of the Week Daltile's Luminique from Cooper Lighting; Lighting takes 8 spots in BD&C Top 75 Products for 2025; Smart Grid Data Analytics market report; ABB strengthens grid automation with Netcontrol acquisition; ABB powers VITRO Santa Rosa data center; ABB introduces electromagnetic flowmeter with MQTT; Schneider Electric completes acquisition of SEIPL; It's making a list, checking your data center twice; WESCO International stock analysis; Rockwell Automation and Bolder Industries carbon black facilities; Leading companies in Power Plant Control System market; Leading companies in Electric Motor and Generator market; Schneider Electric commits investment in Tamil Nadu; ABB Strengthens Grid Automation with Netcontrol; Electricians market competition analysis; California cuts PG&E and Edison profits for grid investments; Schneider Electric named top employer in Middle East; ABB Generations 2025 maritime frontiers; Schneider Electric to invest 718 crore in Tamil Nadu; Why analysts think Acuity could be undervalued; Segment evaluation in Transformer market; 20 years strong Fenner Conveyors and ABB.
